counters.description: tips: never push the wave, unless your jungler needs prio, you are ahead or you want to look for a roam. make sure you watch your minions hp. she will be jumping onto them if they are low hp., so don't stand next to low hp minions. try to get lvl 6 without dying, and start roaming with r afterwards. this champion is a laning god, but outside of lane she isn't as strong. don't fight her strong points.

tips: same thing as irelia but this guy can also block all your spells with his shield. don't push the lane, try to keep the wave just in front of your turret range and wait for ganks or just scale up safely. yasuo players tend to make 'silly' mistakes, punish him when he messes up.

tips: shen toplane is probably tf's worst nightmare. when ulting bot always consider if shen has ult or not, and maybe wait for your jungler to also come bot before using destiny. he can also block your gold card with his w if he times it correctly.

tips: whenever the enemy picks this i avoid picking twisted fate into it. his ultimate basically counters your ultimate as you can't see anything. since nocturne r is also a global it is also really easy for him to join in on fights where you ult to. he can also block your gold card with his w.

tips: don't focus too much on harassing him, he will probably regen all your damage with doran's shield/his q/ second wind. make sure you don't waste your w randomly, as this creates a window for him to get damage onto you. careful for his lvl 6 dive potential.
tips: not really that hard to lane against if you don't let him jump onto you. annoying matchup since he can take your ult and have the same map presence you have.

tips: really hard matchup because anivia has an easy time hitting her spells since you have to go in auto attack range in order to trade. start w -> q and play safe and focus on getting good roams, you won't win the laning phase against her.
he outranges you, outtrades you. hard matchup, try to focus on last hitting minions and avoid trading with him.
tips: careful for her lvl 3 all in. good matchup to go barrier in. itemize armor if you feel like you need it. you can easily punish her lvl 1 and level 2.

tips: the reason kassadin is a major threat is not because he will kill you in lane but because twisted fate is not the right champion to punish his scaling. meaning a good kassadin can free scale in this matchup. try to punish him if you can. if he started dorans shield, you should focus on last hitting minions more than trying to poke him out of lane.

tips: crown is a really good mythic item in this matchup. you can also buy zhonya. activate zhonya when he has his ult on you. if the enemy team has alot of ap banshees is a good option too. you can poke him early levels. but make sure you manage your waves properly. don't push him in too far when he has his r.

tips: this is one of the few matchups where i consider going barrier/exhaust instead of ignite. if enemy team is full ad buy plated steelcaps first base. zhonya is a good item to get after your mythic. activate zhonya when he has his r on you. you can poke him early levels. but make sure you manage your waves properly. zed likes a long lane as this gives him enough time to all in without you getting under tower. either fully push in or let him come towards you.

tips: this champion completely counters your roaming potential if the player playing it has any insight on how to play the map. the lane is easy to play but always keep in mind he can ult anyone who you are trying to kill.
tips: swain is nearly impossible to trade with. if you play tf you have to walk into auto attack range in order to trade. once you walk into range, swain can easily do his full combo onto you.

tips: when the enemy picks morgana support and you ult bot wait out her black shield. when she blackshields her adc instantly, just gold card her. this is mostly mind games. if you throw your q first most morgana's will panic blackshield allowing you to gold card the proper target.

tips: this champion when picked by enemy support alters the way you have to play. consider playing for topside with your r instead of botside. or when ulting botside focus him instead of the adc, make sure to ignite him to reduce his healing.

tips: only really bad midlaners lose lane as zoe in this matchup. ward behind the walls to see where she positions for her sleep. you are only looking to scale in this matchup and setting up ganks for your jungler. mercs is a really high value item here.

tips: this is basically the same as yasuo (he is his brother). this matchup is in my opnion a bit easier because he doesn't have windwall. try to poke him a bit early levels and then focus on your wave managment. let the waves come for you and don't let him freeze.
tips: this champion is a bit annoying since his waveclear is really good and his roaming too. though i have not seen him alot in season 11 so it seems he is not that viable at the moment.
tips: when played support this is pretty anoying for twisted fate once he hits level 6. he will ult the target you are trying to kill, so just like morgana blackshield this is kind of a mind game.
tips: leblanc feels really strong at the moment. consider buying mercs first item here.
tips: this matchup can be surprisingly hard if the azir player is good. try to not get poked too hard by his sand soldiers early. you will be alot more useful than him when you can ult to sidelanes.

tips: if viktor starts q, avoid trading with him. if viktor starts e the matchup is very much playable lvl 1. keep in mind viktor his r has a silence so he can stop your r if he casts it on top of you.
tips: mercs is a good first buy in this matchup. trading with her will

synergies.description: tips: perfect duo champion for tf. gold card, lee can hit his q for free, easy kill. since he is ad the enemy also won't be able to itemize mercs/banshees like they could when you play with eve/nidalee.
tips: same as lee sin basically. khazix has a free engage if you gold card enemy. since he is ad the enemy also won't be able to itemize mercs/banshees like they could when you play with eve/nidalee.
tips: if you have a shen top try to coordinate ult usage and 5 man bot with the jungler.
tips: you can play sidelane kingdom with rengar. easy to catch out adc's that have no macro sense with this combo.
tips: insane duo roaming potential.
tips: this is a good combo since you can double ult botlane/toplane.
tips: perfect toplaner for tf, should always be a kill if you ult top and camille also has r. you can play sidelane kingdom with her after laning phase.

tips: the reason gp is ideal is not because you want to play towards top but because you only play for bot. gp is the perfect weakside champion and is a perfect pick if you only want to play towards bot with twisted fate.
tips: try to give viego a reset on his r in teamfights. if fed he is the perfect hypercarry to play towards.
tips: if talon is your jungler you can try to play towards killing enemy backline with him instead of kiting with your adc.
tips: taliyah jungle is perfect for twisted fate. gold card your laner and taliyah can hit her combo for free.
tips: perfect support with twisted fate. makes ulting botlane a lot better since you can chain cc your opponent.
tips: perfect support with twisted fate. makes ulting botlane a lot better since you can chain cc your opponent.
tips: perfect support with twisted fate. makes ulting botlane a lot better since you can chain cc your opponent.
tips: easiest gank setup in the game.
tips: kaisa can ult jump onto your gold card if you go for a target in the backline.
tips: good reason to ult top if the urgot in your team is competent enough to carry the game.

tips: a lot of people think this is a good combo because its easy gank setup. but if the enemy team buys merc treads you and elise will both have a lot less value as champions since you both rely on cc and magic damage.

people seem to think this is a good jungler to pair with twisted fate but she isn't. yes, she can hit her spear of of your gold card but if enemy team all buy mercs (which they will if they are smart), you are both going to be useless.
if the enemy team buys merc treads you and evelynn will both have a lot less value as champions since you both rely on cc and magic damage.
